jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at SRL Diagnostics
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
